nameMeanings.name: Calverley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

variants.name: Calvery
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German Kälberer(see Kalberer ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Calverley was born before 1435, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Walter Calverley, Esq., was 37 and her mother, Elizabeth Markenfield, was 34. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with John Wentworth. She died in 1516, in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Calverley est née avant 1435, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Calverley, Esq., avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Markenfield, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec John Wentworth. Elle est décédée en 1516, à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Calverley vor 1435 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Calverley, Esq. 37 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Markenfield 34. Sie hatte mit John Wentworth mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1516 in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Calverley è nata il prima del 1435 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Walter Calverley, Esq., aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Markenfield, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con John Wentworth. Morì nel 1516, nel Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Calverleyが1435年以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Walter Calverley, Esq.は37歳，母Elizabeth Markenfieldは34歳であった。彼女はJohn Wentworthとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1516年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Calverley(이)가 1435년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Calverley, Esq.(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Markenfield(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 John Wentworth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1516년 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Calverley nasceu antes 1435, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Calverley, Esq., tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Markenfield, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com John Wentworth. Ela faleceu em 1516, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Calverley родилась перед 1435 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Walter Calverley, Esq. было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Markenfield, 34. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от John Wentworth. Она умерла в 1516 г. в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Calverley nació antes de 1435, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter Calverley, Esq., tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Markenfield, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con John Wentworth. Murió en 1516, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
